name: Grilled Sweet Peppers
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the broiler or grill.
2. In a small bowl, combine the mustard, onion, garlic, and pepper.
3. Place the bell peppers on the grill or under the broiler and brush with the mustard mixture.
4. Cook the bell peppers until lightly browned on one side.
5. Turn the peppers and brush the other side with the mustard mixture.
6. Continue cooking until both sides are browned and slightly softened.
7. Serve hot or cold with any remaining marinade.
